prompt:
🎞️ Scene 1 (0–4s)
Aerial drone establishing shot → slow cinematic descent (24fps, anamorphic lens feel, slight film grain)
Golden sunrise spills across a misty میدان. A professional female rider in professional outfit of horse ridding stands beside her horse.

🎞️ Scene 2 (4–8s)
Low-angle tracking shot (gimbal stabilized) capturing hooves hitting الأرض

Front tracking shot (camera dolly backward smoothly)

title: Tokyo Zombie Outbreak Storyboard
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on use this for storyboard as well as visual, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X thread explicitly mentions Happy Horse, and the visible prompt text appears in the same X conversation thread.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for use this for storyboard as well as visual as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
use this for storyboard as well as visual for happy horse

Create a 15-second ultra-cinematic IMAX-quality video of a sudden zombie outbreak in modern Tokyo at dusk. Epic blockbuster style — massive scale, dramatic tension, Hollywood-level production like World War Z meets Train to Busan. Intense but not gratuitous gore. Professional real estate agent vibe replaced with urgent news-reporter/documentary urgency mixed with cinematic awe.

Use these 15 reference images in exact sequence as storyboard for perfect shot-by-shot control:

Image 1: Wide aerial shot of glowing Tokyo skyline at blue hour, Shibuya crossing packed with people
Image 2: Busy Shibuya street level, crowds walking normally under neon lights
Image 3: Sudden chaos — first infected person collapsing and turning in the middle of the crowd
Image 4-5: Panic spreads — people running as more zombies emerge from side streets
Image 6: High-angle tracking shot of hordes chasing through Shibuya scramble crossing
Image 7: Close dramatic shot of a salaryman turning into a zombie under flickering neon signs
Image 8: Group of survivors barricading inside a convenience store
Image 9: Intense interior shot — zombies banging on glass doors and windows
Image 10: Wide shot of Tokyo streets descending into full outbreak chaos with overturned cars and fires
Image 11: Heroic wide cinematic shot of a small group running toward Tokyo Tower in the distance
Image 12: Dramatic low-angle shot looking up at infected climbing buildings and billboards
Image 13: Epic pull-back aerial revealing the scale — massive zombie hordes flooding major avenues
Image 14: Final tense wide shot of survivors on a rooftop overlooking the infected city
Image 15: Dark cinematic closing shot with Tokyo Tower silhouetted against smoke and red emergency lights

Style: True IMAX cinematic — 8K resolution feel, anamorphic lens flares, subtle film grain, dynamic camera movement with sweeping drones, intense tracking shots, and dramatic slow-motion on key impacts. Moody teal-orange color grade, volumetric lighting, god rays through smoke. Highly realistic, photorealistic details, perfect consistency across all frames.

Camera: Dynamic Hollywood director style — smooth gliding drones, intense handheld urgency in close shots, epic wide establishing shots. Medium-high motion strength for chaotic energy without losing control.

Add subtle text overlays in clean cinematic font:
- "Tokyo, 22:47"
- "Outbreak Day 1"
- "They Were Never Ready"

Background audio direction: Tense orchestral swell with distant sirens, heart-pounding drums, and subtle human screams. Duration: Exactly 15 seconds. Vertical 9:16 for social media or 16:9 cinematic.

title: Live Football Broadcast Sequence
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on A cinematic 6-scene sequence in authentic live-broadcast documentary, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X thread explicitly mentions Happy Horse, and the visible prompt text appears in the same X conversation thread.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for A cinematic 6-scene sequence in authentic live-broadcast documentary as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
A cinematic 6-scene sequence in authentic live-broadcast documentary style, shot as real sports television coverage at a packed professional football stadium at night. Warm floodlights, electric crowd energy, Sony broadcast aesthetic, natural motion blur, shallow depth of field, warm saturated colour grade, 16:9 widescreen.
SCENE 1 — WIDE ESTABLISHING SHOT: Sweeping high-angle aerial of the massive, fully packed modern stadium under blazing floodlights. Perfect green pitch, tens of thousands of roaring fans, players as tiny figures in full match action. Slow cinematic push-in capturing pulsing atmosphere.
SCENE 2 — CROWD CLOSE-UP: Broadcast camera cuts to stands. A young woman with long dark hair, natural beauty, wearing purple fan scarf and dark jacket, sits relaxed among animated supporters. She casually glances away from the pitch, calm and comfortable. Warm lighting on her face, shallow focus, authentic close-up framing.
SCENE 3 — MATCH ACTION: Wide broadcast angle on intense play near the goal. Players in white kits creating a near scoring chance as the crowd reacts. Visible advertising boards, tense live atmosphere, natural sports production motion.
SCENE 4 — JUMBOTRON MOMENT: Giant stadium screen lights up with candid live close-up of the young woman. Her face fills the massive jumbotron. Crowd around her erupts — pointing, laughing, cheering. Camera pulls back to show her in the stands and her image on screen simultaneously. Electric, joyful reaction.
SCENE 5 — HER CHEERING REACTION: Tight close-up as she realises she’s on the big screen. Her face lights up with a wide genuine smile, bursting into laughter and cheering wildly with both arms raised, purple scarf swinging. Pure spontaneous joy. Surrounding fans celebrate with her. Warm handheld broadcast feel.
SCENE 6 — CROWD ENERGY: Wide shot pulling back across the stands. Hundreds of fans in white kits with arms raised, chanting in unison, scarves waving. Overwhelming euphoric collective passion under golden floodlights. Slow cinematic pan across the roaring sea of faces as match atmosphere peaks.

title: Sneaker Factory Animation
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on Use the attached GPT Image 2 THE SNEAKER, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Happy Horse and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for Use the attached GPT Image 2 THE SNEAKER as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
“Use the attached GPT Image 2 THE SNEAKER FACTORY storyboard image as the exact visual reference. Create a 12-second 16:9 Pixar-style animated sneaker factory sequence. Keep the same young factory worker in modern streetwear and black gloves throughout. Preserve the futuristic sneaker factory, robotic arms, conveyor belts, laser machines, glowing assembly stations, industrial LED lighting, and polished metallic environment.

8 shots total, ~1.5 seconds each, following the storyboard exactly.

1. Wide cinematic opener — giant sneaker factory alive with movement, robotic arms assembling shoes, conveyor belts carrying sneakers, LED screens glowing overhead. Worker stands center frame holding a finished sneaker confidently.

2. Extreme close-up slow motion — precision laser cutting through black sneaker fabric, tiny glowing sparks flying upward under bright blue machine lights.

3. Medium shot — worker guiding sneaker material through an industrial sewing machine while glowing stitching lines rapidly form across the fabric.

4. Overhead locked shot — fresh white sneaker soles pressed onto the upper by a giant hydraulic machine, steam releasing dramatically from the press.

5. Side tracking shot — robotic arm lifting finished sneakers from the conveyor and placing them perfectly into rows beneath glowing warehouse lights.

6. Close-up — worker threading bright white laces into a finished sneaker quickly and precisely, tiny fabric textures highly visible.

7. Overhead beauty shot — multiple finished sneakers displayed on a glossy white table while the camera slowly pushes inward. Reflections glowing beneath the shoes.

8. Wider cinematic shot — worker puts on the finished sneakers and takes one confident step across the polished factory floor, reflections and LED lights glowing beneath him.

Style: Pixar CGI realism, futuristic industrial lighting, vivid sneaker colors, polished metallic reflections, neon blue and orange machine glow, smooth cinematic cuts, constant subtle conveyor and robotic motion.

Sound: Energetic futuristic electronic music plays continuously throughout. Layer laser cutting sounds, machine hums, hydraulic presses, robotic arm movements, stitching sounds, sneaker squeaks, and one final confident footstep echo underneath.

Goal: A hyper-satisfying 12-second futuristic sneaker production journey from raw fabric to the first step in the finished pair.”

More 👇

title: Dark Forest Thriller Setup
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on CINEMATIC SETUP] Film Style: Dark atmospheric thriller, 50mm, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X thread explicitly mentions Happy Horse, and the visible prompt text appears in the same X conversation thread.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for CINEMATIC SETUP] Film Style: Dark atmospheric thriller, 50mm as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
[CINEMATIC SETUP]
Film Style: Dark atmospheric thriller, 50mm anamorphic, heavy contrast ratio, TLOU2 environmental grade.
Lens: 50mm locked center-frame. Zero lens distortion. Arch perfectly symmetric in frame.
Color Grade: Near-black foreground, deep forest teal midground, pale white-grey mist glow at arch center. No warm tones.
Lighting: Single backlight source — diffused overcast sky through arch opening. All foreground in silhouette. No fill.
Camera Behavior: Locked static. All motion in subject and atmosphere only. Zero camera movement.
Audio: Low 30Hz resonant stone hum; water dripping from arch keystone; wind channeling through tunnel; soft footstep on wet cobblestone.

[TIMELINE]
0-4s: SILHOUETTE HOLD. Locked wide shot. Lone figure stands motionless at arch center, backlit by pale mist glow. Mist drifts slowly through arch from rear, dispersing forward. Carved stone above arch barely visible in near-black shadow.
4-8s: FIGURE ADVANCES. Figure strides forward toward camera — boots strike wet cobblestone, shallow puddle splash visible at foot contact. Mist swirls in figure's wake. Arch interior darkens slightly as figure moves into foreground shadow.
8-12s: CLOSE APPROACH. Figure enters mid-frame closer — face still obscured in silhouette. Backlit mist glow halos their outline. Vines above arch sway in wind draft. Camera remains locked.

[STYLE & QUALITY BOOSTERS]
8K, extreme contrast HDR, zero fill on foreground, coherent silhouette motion, realistic cobblestone

prompt: A cinematic tracking shot capturing a simultaneous tectonic, atmospheric, and oceanic collapse. The ground erupts in a violent seismic upheaval, creating a massive jagged canyon that splits a dense metropolitan grid in half. Simultaneously, a colossal wall of glacial seawater surges through the city streets, flash freezing everything it touches into crystalline structures. Emerging from the heart of the freezing flood, a gargantuan multi-vortex funnel cloud darkened by pulverized debris and glowing with internal orange lightning rips the facade off a steel skyscraper, spiraling shards of glass and heavy machinery into a chaotic orbit. The camera executes a dynamic, low altitude fly through beneath a bridge as it buckles and snaps, weaving through flying wreckage and swirling snow squalls. The lighting transitions from a dark, bruised violet sky to blinding white flashes of exploding transformers, finishing with a wide angle vista of a mountain range being swallowed by a towering wall of ice and wind. Hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, intricate particle physics, 35mm anamorphic lens, and high contrast volumetric atmosphere.

title: Food Interaction Video Test
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on Honestly, Seedance 2.0 is looking absolutely incredible in, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Happy Horse and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for Honestly, Seedance 2.0 is looking absolutely incredible in as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
Honestly, Seedance 2.0 is looking absolutely incredible in these tests. The temporal stability, consistency of the food, and overall aesthetic polish are top-tier. It handles the task of eating and object interaction remarkably well, keeping the scene cohesive and visually stunning from start to finish.

That said, Happy Horse 1.0 definitely brings its own distinct merits to the table. What stood out to me immediately were the natural lighting and the subtle micro-expressions. It captures a much more raw, wide-eyed surprise after taking a bite of fried chicken, or the nuanced eyebrow movements while chewing.
If you want to run your own head-to-head comparisons video, here is the base image-to-video prompt I used.

Prompt: "Each frame of a young middle eastern woman Image_1 is converted into a video and connected. A video of eating junk food deliciously. Pleasant chewing sound. BGM."

title: Stadium Influencer Vlog
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on Create a 15-second ultra-realistic cinematic influencer vlog video, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Happy Horse and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for Create a 15-second ultra-realistic cinematic influencer vlog video as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
Create a 15-second ultra-realistic cinematic influencer vlog video. Use the same consistent character throughout all shots.
Authentic iPhone 14 Pro TikTok vlog realism, handheld camera imperfections, front-camera selfies mixed with back-camera stadium footage, natural motion blur, autofocus breathing, slight rolling-shutter wobble, realistic HDR, and loud crowd audio distortion. 24 fps, 26 mm lens equivalent.
Scene 1 (0–3s) — Stadium Intro
Front-facing selfie outside Emirates Stadiumbefore kickoff. Fans stream behind her.
She says: “Guys, I’m at Arsenal vs Burnley and the atmosphere is absolutely insane!”
Scene 2 (3–6s) — In the Stands
Selfie from her seat with the pitch glowing behind her.
She says: “We’ve got such a good view. Arsenal look really sharp already!”
Scene 3 (6–9s) — Match Action
Back camera shows Arsenal F.C.attacking Burnley F.C..
She shouts: “Come on Arsenal… shoot! SHOOT!”
Scene 4 (9–12s) — Goal Moment
Back camera captures Arsenal scoring.
She screams: “GOAL! Oh my God, I got it!”
Scene 5 (12–15s) — Celebration Selfie
Front-facing selfie as she jumps and laughs with celebrating fans behind her.
She says: “I actually caught the goal on camera! Best moment ever! Come on Arsenal!”
Final Tone: Raw, emotional, high-energy football vlog with authentic stadium atmosphere and a euphoric goal reaction. use a frame size of 16:9

title: Rainy Cyberpunk Cyborg Alley
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on Scene: A rain-soaked cyberpunk alley at night, neon, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Happy Horse and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for Scene: A rain-soaked cyberpunk alley at night, neon as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
Scene:
A rain-soaked cyberpunk alley at night, neon signs reflecting across black puddles, steam rising from street vents, blue and magenta light cutting through thin fog.

Subject:
A tall cybernetic human with chrome-plated arms, exposed mechanical joints, one glowing red optical implant, a black tactical coat, and illuminated circuit lines running beneath translucent skin panels.

Action:
The cyborg stands motionless under a flickering neon sign, turns its head slowly toward the camera, clenches one mechanical hand, then steps forward through shallow puddles as reflections ripple outward with each footstep.

Camera:
Medium low-angle shot, camera slowly dollies backward in front of the cyborg while maintaining eye-level focus on the glowing optical implant.

Physics:
Rain falls consistently onto metal surfaces, droplets bead and slide across chrome plating, steam curls upward from vents, puddles ripple naturally under the cyborg’s weight.

Audio:
Heavy rain, distant traffic hum, buzzing neon, hydraulic servo sounds with each movement, low electronic bass pulse.

Style:
Gritty cinematic cyberpunk realism, high-contrast neon lighting, detailed mechanical surfaces, grounded physical motion, Blade Runner-inspired atmosphere.

title: Indian Asylum Found Footage
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on Found footage inside an abandoned Indian mental asylum, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Happy Horse and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for Found footage inside an abandoned Indian mental asylum as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt: Found footage inside an abandoned Indian mental asylum at night. No animation. Handheld smartphone camera, heavy grain, low light, single torch beam. The room is small and decayed—peeling paint, cracked tiles, rusted bed frame, damp walls, deep shadows swallowing corners. Natural audio only. Starts with a close up of An Indian woman with sharp fangs, saliva dripping from mouth is present in the room. Start with her screaming and showing those fangs. She wears a torn mental-asylum gown. Her body is unnaturally thin. Her skin is pale with faint cracks and decay, veins subtly visible. Her eyes are scary, unfocused, not glowing. Long tangled black hair partially hides her face.She moves in a deeply unsettling way—crawling low across the floor. Her head tilts unpredictably. Limbs bend in disturbing ways. She occasionally stops, stares directly toward the camera, then resumes crawling. She climbs up the peeled asylum walls as the camera tries to zoom in and catch her movement.She speaks intermittently gibberish, voice distorted and possessed. The words feel wrong, fragmented, and unsettling. Breathing, scratching sounds, and fabric dragging against walls are clearly audible.The camera operator backs away in panic as her movements become faster and more aggressive. She suddenly lunges directly toward the camera, face filling the frame, hair whipping forward. Abrupt hard cut to black.High drama, realistic, no animation

title: China Traffic CCTV Scene
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on Static CCTV-style footage from a high-mounted traffic camera, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Happy Horse and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for Static CCTV-style footage from a high-mounted traffic camera as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
Static CCTV-style footage from a high-mounted traffic camera overlooking a busy urban intersection in China during daytime. Slight compression artifacts, low dynamic range, faint color cast (green/blue tint), timestamp overlay in top corner (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS), subtle frame skipping, no camera movement.

Ambient audio minimal or absent (typical CCTV), or faint distant traffic hum.

The frame shows a four-way junction with traffic lights, zebra crossing, scooters, and cars moving normally.

A man on a scooter slowly enters the intersection as the light changes. He is midway across.

From the right side of frame, a car suddenly enters at high speed, clearly violating the signal.

There is no dramatic buildup—just normal traffic, then sudden danger.

The car slams into the scooter.

Impact is abrupt and chaotic—
the scooter breaks apart and skids across the road, debris scattering.
But the man—due to the angle of impact—
is thrown slightly aside and lands on his feet, stumbling but not crushed.

The car continues forward for a few meters before stopping abruptly.
For a moment, everything freezes.

Nearby pedestrians hesitate, then begin running toward the scene.

The man stands there, shocked, looking down at the destroyed scooter.

Timestamp continues ticking.

No zoom, no cut.
